Petition For 1) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Trust - Mistake; 2) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Tr
Off Calendar Oct-28-2020 Continued To Dec-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Shashona Holmons Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karly Peterson appeared by zoom for Victoria Caldwell (Petitioner)
Sil Iapis appeared by zoom for Shashona Holmon.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to the issue of whether or not their respective Clients have standing. Discussion was held regarding whether or not the actions taken by Ms. Tapia were invalid, whether there is a separate property claim, status of mediation, etc. Both parties requested an extended date for completion of mediation. Upon conclusion of argument, the Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is granted without prejudice and with leave to amend within 20-days from today's hearing. The amended petition must be filed by November 10, 2020. Mr. Liapis is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For 1) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Trust - Mistake; 2) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Tr
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Continued To Mar-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For 1) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Trust - Mistake; 2) Revocation, Cancellation, And/Or Voiding Of Irrevocable Tr
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karly Peterson for Victoria Caldwell (Petitioner).
Sil Liapis for and with Shashona Holman (Objector).

The Court asks the parties where they plan to go. Ms. Peterson stated that she hopes the Court will grant the relief she is requesting, that the Probate Examiner has requested additional information from both Counsel, that they had a problem with getting information from the prior Trustee and that she is still seeking the relief. Mr. Liapis stated that no evidence was presented, that Ms. Caldwell has no standing, that Ms. Caldwell is neither a Trustee nor a Beneficiary, that she is not an heir, a child, or a spouse, and that if the trust is invalidated, it goes intestate and she is not a beneficiary. Mr. Liapis also stated that he thinks the matter can be resolved on the papers and that no discovery is necessary. Ms. Peterson stated that they are dealing with a blended family and that discovery is requested. The Court orders the Parties to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than January 24, 2020. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation and file a joint status report by January 28, 2020. The Petition for Revocation, Cancellation and/or Voiding of Irrevocable Trust, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on February 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The joint status report is to address status of mediation, any outstanding discovery issues and timelines, what the claims are, the factual issues, the time estimate of the evidentiary hearing, who the witnesses will be and time estimates of witness testimony.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

Courtesy copy of Shashona Holmon's Opposition to Petition and Petition to Resolve Questions of Trust Construction e-filed on 9/6/2019 is received in open court.
